description: Investigate and fix false drift detection in IncrementalCache where unchanged files are incorrectly marked as changed
goal: Identify root cause of false positive drift detection and implement fix
requirements: Add diagnostic logging to track drift decisions
Fix the root cause (likely path format or mtime precision issues)

success_criteria.primary: Unchanged files show 100% hit ratio on subsequent scans
success_criteria.secondary: Diagnostic output shows clear reason when drift is detected
